_description: Canonical facts the encrypt-solana-prealpha skill MUST convey. Each fact lists ALL-of phrases that must co-occur in the skill bundle (SKILL.md + references/**). Matching is case-insensitive after whitespace normalization.

facts.why: Critical safety: ciphertexts can be plaintext on-chain in pre-alpha.
Book says vectors use element-wise #[encrypt_fn] with EUint*Vector — NOT always #[encrypt_fn_graph].
2026-04-17 upstream commit added Quasar as a 4th CPI framework row.
Env table must carry the full canonical program id.
Env table must carry the full canonical gRPC URL.
encrypt.v1.EncryptService is the canonical gRPC service.
Skill must explicitly disambiguate from ika dWallet signing.
First ix byte = discriminator; emit_event lives at 228.
Plan part C: audit + audit-force + audit-fix must all surface.
drift-rules.mjs must be discoverable from SKILL.md or references.
Disambiguation from ika + production FHE + Sui.

warningFacts.why: Skill must actively state pre-alpha runs no real FHE.
Skill must explicitly disclaim production confidentiality.

forbiddenSubstrings.why: Skill must never suggest pre-alpha timings are real FHE benchmarks.
